settings.support_copy: This product module is structured for future compatibility notes, installation guidance, and support escalation without overloading the purchase flow.

settings.title: Core capability
settings.copy: Reserved for a primary technical or workflow benefit.

settings.title: Deployment fit
settings.copy: Reserved for setup context, device compatibility, or workspace fit.

settings.title: Support readiness
settings.copy: Reserved for downloads, manuals, or after-purchase continuity.

settings.heading: A modular layer for feature explanation and technical positioning
settings.copy: Structured to support richer product storytelling, proof points, and use-case sequencing in later phases.

settings.title: Primary feature explanation
settings.copy: Reserved for a lead product feature and why it matters in real use.

settings.title: Workflow or setup value
settings.copy: Reserved for product deployment, platform support, or connection context.

settings.title: Support continuity
settings.copy: Reserved for firmware, manuals, or compatibility reassurance.

settings.heading: Specifications
settings.copy: This section is designed to evolve into a metafield-backed technical specification table.
settings.source_note: Section blocks can be replaced with product metafield-backed rows in a later implementation pass.

settings.heading: A comparison module ready for structured datasets
settings.copy: This area can later map to metaobject-backed comparison groups, buying guides, or compatibility matrices.
settings.source_note: Use blocks for early internal review, then migrate repeated comparison data into structured content.

settings.title: Comparison candidate
settings.copy: Reserved for alternate product or adjacent solution positioning.

settings.title: Comparison candidate
settings.copy: Reserved for differentiated workflow, port mix, or power profile.

settings.title: Comparison candidate
settings.copy: Reserved for higher-tier, lower-tier, or specialized alternative guidance.

settings.question: Where should product-level support questions live?
settings.answer: Use this section for questions tightly related to setup, usage, or compatibility. Broader support content should move into the support center as structured resources.

settings.question: How will specifications scale later?
settings.answer: The current table is block-based for review speed, but the section is intended to migrate to product metafields or metaobject-backed technical datasets.

settings.heading: Support and compatibility can stay connected to the PDP
settings.copy: This module gives product pages a controlled route into manuals, downloads, and compatibility guidance.
